chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1820 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.111/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7845/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on statement dated 10.01.2024 (Withdraw) 5. For orders on CMA No.7846/2023 (Stay) 6. For hearing of main case 10.01.2024 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 6. Learned Counsel submits that by mistake instead of appeal against the impugned order, a CP has been filed; hence, he withdraws the same with permission to file appeal subject to all just legal exceptions. Accordingly, petition stands dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications, in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
